overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City. The journey begins in a neon-lit covered arcade, transitions through sunlit streets and elevated walkways, passes a massive golden religious statue, and continues through the bustling cyberpunk downtown with mixed Japanese-inspired and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered shopping arcade with neon signage

events.description: exits covered arcade into open sunlit intersection
crosses pedestrian crosswalk with white stripes

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered arcade and exiting onto the sunlit street, crossing the intersection

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving along the street parallel to the crosswalk

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure with red and white panels providing partial cover
tall vertical neon sign with red and blue graphics on building facade
building covered in large purple and pink neon signage and advertisements
zebra crossing pattern on the asphalt street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered urban arcade with neon-lit storefronts. The camera follows the character as they exit the sheltered walkway into bright morning sunlight, crossing a zebra-striped pedestrian crosswalk. A yellow taxi passes on the right as the scene transitions from enclosed to open urban space.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with red structural beams

events.description: begins ascending ramp with blue neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under the overpass and beginning to ascend the illuminated ramp

entered.detail: heavy red steel beams supporting the elevated highway above
ramp entrance with glowing blue neon steps and purple trim
large cylindrical support columns for the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath an elevated highway structure supported by massive red steel beams and concrete pillars. The environment is dimly lit with artificial light filtering through. The character approaches and begins ascending a ramp marked by striking blue neon illumination, transitioning from street level to an elevated pedestrian walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with city vista and religious monument

events.description: approaches massive golden multi-armed statue dominating the skyline

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway approaching the golden statue, with the city skyline visible in the background

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the elevated path toward the statue

entered.detail: massive multi-armed golden religious statue with glowing energy effects between hands
futuristic skyscrapers with various neon billboards and advertisements
red-painted elevated roadway structure running parallel to the walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a wide elevated walkway with full sky visibility and natural sunlight. The camera approaches an enormous golden Buddha-like statue with multiple arms and glowing energy spheres. The futuristic city skyline rises in the background with towering skyscrapers and neon signage, while a red elevated highway structure runs along the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending ramp from elevated plaza to street level

events.description: begins descending ramp from elevated walkway to street level
crosses yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk at intersection

agents.ego_description: descending the ramp from the elevated walkway, passing the statue and approaching street level to cross the intersection

entered.detail: white curved roof of traditional Japanese building visible below the ramp
steam rising from building exhaust vents
traditional red Japanese gate structure marking the intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: The character descends the ramp from the elevated plaza, passing close by the massive golden statue now on the left. Traditional Japanese architectural elements contrast with the modern city below. Steam rises from vents as the camera approaches street level, where a red torii gate marks the intersection ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with hotel entrance and vending machines

events.description: enters covered sidewalk area with neon-lit hotel entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk past the hotel entrance and various storefronts

notable_agents.action: group of NPCs seated on bench outside the hotel

entered.detail: building with purple neon HOTEL sign and teal architectural trim
broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing on the street
red vending machine with BURRITOxx signage and food advertisements
glowing arcade game cabinets visible through windows

segments.scene_description: Having descended to street level, the character walks along a commercial sidewalk with moderate pedestrian traffic. A hotel with bright neon signage occupies the right side, where NPCs sit on a bench. The character passes a red burrito vending machine and arcade cabinets, continuing through the covered walkway with mixed natural and artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit urban arcade through an elevated plaza and back down into a bustling commercial district. It begins within a sheltered walkway of glowing storefronts before emerging into bright morning sunlight to cross a pedestrian street as a yellow taxi passes. The camera then moves beneath the shadow of a massive red steel highway structure, ascending a blue-neon ramp that transitions the view from the dim street level to an open, sunlit elevated walkway. This vista expands to reveal a towering golden multi-armed statue set against a futuristic skyline, before the character descends back toward the city floor past traditional Japanese architectural elements and rising steam. Finally, the scene shifts back to street level, passing a red torii gate and a neon-lit hotel toward a covered sidewalk filled with vending machines and pedestrians.
